dimensions.name: Six-Second Scan
dimensions.question: Can a recruiter answer 'what does this person do?' in six seconds?

anchors.0: Summary is all adjectives. No artifact named on page 1.
anchors.3: Summary names role and years but no stack/domain. Top bullet is buzzword soup.
anchors.6: Summary names role, years, stack. Top bullet has a verb + vague noun.
anchors.9: Summary names role, years, stack, one specific recent scope. Top bullet has artifact + collaborator.
anchors.10: Plus: first 1-2 words of every bullet vary, no two are identical.

dimensions.name: Credibility
dimensions.question: Would any bullet collapse on one follow-up question?

anchors.0: Multiple invented metrics or phantom artifacts; scope inflation throughout.
anchors.3: One invented metric or one scope-inflated bullet on page 1.
anchors.6: No clearly invented numbers, but several vague ownership claims.
anchors.9: Every metric has a source. All 'Led/Owned' claims are honest. 1-2 unsurvivable claims remain.
anchors.10: Plus: at least one bullet honestly describes something that went wrong or was decided against.

dimensions.name: ATS
dimensions.question: Will the system parse and match this?

anchors.0: Image-only PDF / scanned. No standard headings. Tables for core content.
anchors.3: Text-selectable PDF but multi-column layout or icon-heavy skills section.
anchors.6: Standard headings, one-column. Some role keywords but only in a skills dump.
anchors.9: Plus: 8+ role keywords inside real bullets. Exact tool names.
anchors.10: Plus: zero keyword stuffing, no hidden text, skills with exact versions where relevant.

dimensions.name: Impact vs Activity
dimensions.question: Did they ship or just attend?

anchors.0: 80%+ activity verbs (Was responsible for, Supported, Helped with).
anchors.3: Mostly activity; 1-2 impact bullets buried lower.
anchors.6: ~50/50 impact vs activity. Top bullet of recent role is impact.
anchors.9: ~70% impact bullets on page 1. Every impact bullet names an artifact.
anchors.10: Plus: at least one bullet describes a specific decision (kept/killed/replaced).

dimensions.name: Tone
dimensions.question: Does this sound human or LLM-polished?

anchors.0: Symmetric rhythm. Tier-1 buzzwords on every line. Em-dashes everywhere.
anchors.3: Some buzzwords removed; bullets still uniformly 20-25 words.
anchors.6: Mixed lengths; varied lead verbs. 1-2 buzzwords slip through.
anchors.9: Zero Tier-1 buzzwords. One bullet <14 words; one >22. No shared lead words.
anchors.10: Plus: one bullet would have been impossible for ChatGPT to write.
